CREATE TABLE union_table (id INTEGER, tag VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO union_table VALUES (1, union_value(k := 'foo')), (2, union_value(k := 'bar'));
SELECT union_tag(union_value(k := 'foo')) AS current_tag FROM union_table WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE other_table (union_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO other_table VALUES (1, 'First entry'), (2, 'Second entry');
SELECT o.description, union_tag(u.tag) AS current_tag FROM union_table u JOIN other_table o ON u.id = o.union_id WHERE u.id = 1;
SELECT union_tag(union_value(k := 'foo')) FROM (SELECT tag FROM union_table WHERE tag IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
WITH Tags AS (SELECT union_value(k := 'baz') AS tag UNION SELECT union_value(k := 'qux') AS tag) SELECT union_tag(tag) FROM Tags;
SELECT DISTINCT union_tag(union_value(k := 'foo')) FROM union_table WHERE id > 0 ORDER BY id;
SELECT union_tag(t.u_val) FROM test_union t WHERE t.u_val IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO union_table VALUES (3, union_value(k := 'foo2')) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
SELECT union_tag(u.tag) FROM (SELECT union_value(k := 'set1') AS tag UNION ALL SELECT union_value(k := 'set2')) AS u;
